candidates.text:
- day 1: arrive in rome, check into hotel near the colosseum, evening orientation walk around the pantheon
- day 2: visit the capitol museum and the rome financial district, lunch at a local restaurant, afternoon visit to the vatican
- day 3: tour the rome stock exchange, attend a networking event at a local business center, evening dinner at a rooftop restaurant
- day 4: travel to florence by train, check into hotel near the duomo, evening walk along the arno river
- day 5: visit the florence stock exchange, attend a seminar on italian financial markets, afternoon visit to the uffizi gallery
- day 6: explore the florence business district, lunch at a traditional tuscan restaurant, evening visit to the michelangelo's david
- day 7: travel to venice by train, check into hotel near the grand canal, evening gondola ride
- day 8: visit the venice stock exchange, attend a conference on italian banking, afternoon visit to the doge's palace
- day 9: explore the venice business district, lunch at a local seafood restaurant, evening visit to the bridge of sighs
- day 10: day trip to a nearby financial hub, attend a workshop on italian investment strategies, evening return to venice
- day 11: morning walk along the canals, visit a local art gallery, afternoon visit to the st. mark's square
- day 12: departure from venice, final networking event at [address]

- day 1: arrive in rome, check into hotel near via del corso, attend welcome dinner at [restaurant name]
- day 2: visit rome's financial district, tour the bank of italy headquarters at via napoleone 23, evening networking event
- day 3: explore rome's art and finance history, visit the museum of the italy bank at [address], dinner at a local trattoria
- day 4: travel to florence, check into hotel near via del giglio, attend seminar on italian economic policy at [venue name]
- day 5: visit florence's old stock exchange, tour the uffizi gallery, evening cocktail reception at [address]
- day 6: attend workshop on sustainable finance at the florence business school, afternoon free for personal exploration
- day 7: travel to venice, check into hotel near san marco, attend panel on maritime trade and finance at [venue name]
- day 8: explore venice's historical financial landmarks, visit the palace of the doges, evening gala dinner at [restaurant name]
- day 9: attend conference on fintech innovation in venice at [address], networking session with industry leaders
- day 10: visit venice's glassblowing workshops, understand artisanal economics, afternoon free for relaxation
- day 11: return to rome, attend closing seminar on future trends in italian finance at [venue name]
- day 12: depart from rome, reflect on insights gained, share experiences with colleagues

- day 1: arrive in rome, check into hotel at [rome hotel address], evening welcome dinner at [restaurant name]
- day 2: visit rome’s financial district, tour the bank of italy headquarters, lunch at [lunch spot]
- day 3: guided tour of the colosseum and roman forum, afternoon workshop on italian banking regulations at [venue]
- day 4: travel to florence by train, check into hotel at [florence hotel address], evening networking event at [venue]
- day 5: explore florence’s historic center, visit the uffizi gallery, afternoon seminar on italian capital markets at [venue]
- day 6: visit the florence stock exchange, lunch at [lunch spot], afternoon free for personal meetings
- day 7: travel to venice by train, check into hotel at [venice hotel address], evening gondola tour and dinner at [restaurant name]
- day 8: tour venice’s financial and insurance districts, visit the venetian bank museum, afternoon workshop on maritime finance at [venue]
- day 9: day trip to murano and burano, evening panel discussion on fintech in italy at [venue]
- day 10: return to rome by train, check into hotel at [rome hotel address], evening farewell dinner at [restaurant name]
- day 11: optional day for additional meetings or sightseeing, lunch at [lunch spot], departure preparations
- day 12: depart from rome airport, end of trip

- day 1: arrive in rome, check into hotel near via del corso
- day 2: visit the bank of italy headquarters and the stock exchange in rome
- day 3: explore the colosseum and roman forum
- day 4: travel to florence by train, check into hotel near piazza del duomo
- day 5: visit the ubs branch and the florence stock exchange
- day 6: tour the uffizi gallery and the accademia
- day 7: attend a finance workshop at the local university

- day 9: explore the venetian business district and the venetian stock exchange

- day 11: attend a networking event at a local finance firm
- day 12: depart from venice, return home
